Enum Class UrbanHeatIslandModel.LandCover

Enclosing class:
UrbanHeatIslandModel
public static enum UrbanHeatIslandModel.LandCover extends Enum<UrbanHeatIslandModel.LandCover>
Categories of urban land cover with their associated thermal properties.
